channel.title: #Ortholinear · keyboard wire
channel.description: All keyboard wire entries tagged Ortholinear.

item.title: DIY ortholinear keyboard build using Pi Pico and ZMK
item.description: DIY ortholinear build using a Pi Pico running ZMK. Discusses the challenges of a no-stabilizer layout and the "jank" involved in the build. — 30 pts · 7 comments · r/MechanicalKeyboards
